        m = re.search(r"categories? of\s*'([^']+)'", desc, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
        if not m:
            m = re.search(r"categories? of\s*\"([^\"]+)\"", desc, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
        if not m:
            # fallback: categories of ... up to a period
            m = re.search(r"categories? of\s*([^\.]+)\.", desc, flags=re.IGNORECASE)

            cats = [x.strip() for x in re.split(r',|/|;|\band\b|&', content) if x.strip()]
